title: ilex longecaudata var. glabra
intro: Ilex longecaudata var. glabra, also known as Chinese Holly or Smooth-leaved Ilex, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China, belonging to the Aquifoliaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ilex longecaudata var. glabra include reducing fever, relieving headaches and joint pain, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and branches of this plant are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
